About

I turn ad spend into predictable revenue.

I'm Faijas V — a Digital Marketing & E-Commerce Executive based in Dubai with 3+ years scaling D2C brands and agency clients across international markets.

Experience

3+ years scaling brands.

Hands-on across e-commerce growth, paid media, web management and content — for international D2C brands and agency clients.

International E-Commerce Projects
D2C / RemoteSep 2023 – Apr 2026
  • Scaled a D2C e-commerce brand to ₹91 Lakh revenue and acquired 28,940+ customers using full-funnel Meta ad strategies.
  • Managed product uploads, listings and catalog updates on the Shopify storefront.
  • Optimized product titles, descriptions and tags for higher discoverability and conversion.
  • Leveraged Meta Ads Manager to analyze customer behavior and refine campaign performance.

  • Led a social media lead-gen campaign for TheWealthRewire.in, hitting lead targets via paid media and audience targeting.

  • Improved SEO by optimizing website content with targeted keywords.
Digital Marketing Executive
Brandsphear Agency HubJun 2023 – Present
  • Created social posts, reels and short-form video using Canva and CapCut for multiple brand clients.

  • Wrote compelling product descriptions, captions and copy optimized for social and web.
